title: Odyssey 16x
description: After a long break i have decided to yet again release a A Clean & Simple Minecraft 1.8.9 PvP Texture pack!
body:
## ❓ What is it?
This pack is a 16x Minecraft PvP Pack that's **PERFECT** for bedwars, fireball fights and other game modes! This pack is made for [LaughingOdyssey]([https://www.youtube.com/@laughingodysseyofficial]) for hitting the milestone of 1k subscribers!

## 📦 Features:
- Makes Swords take up less screen space.
- Custom Sky, Hotbar, etc.
- Reduces sizes of potions, golden apples, totems, and more.
- Compatible with versions 1.6.1-1.20.2.( 1.8.9 is  most recommended )
- Compatible with Sodium and Optifine.
- Focuses mainly on Minemen club fireball fight/bedfight
- Easy / Light and will not use many more resources.

## 🙋‍♂️ Questions:
### Does Odyssey 16x work with Shaders?
- Should work if the shader doesn't change in-game textures and shaders that make ores glow might lag a bit
### Am I allowed to use this pack in a video, live stream, or "post"?
- Yes, as long as you provide credit to the pack and the creators.

## 📜 Credits
- [ItsFlare](https://www.youtube.com/@ItsFlxre) for pack creation, design, and ownership
- [Vanillaspooks](https://www.youtube.com/@VanillaSpooks) For teaching me a lot of packs and helping me with a lot of textures!
- Tory for the fireball texture
